name: Discovery Silver Corp.
description: Discovery Silver Corp. is an Americas-focused precious metals producer that operates the Porcupine Complex near Timmins, Ontario, Canada, following its April 2025 acquisition from Newmont Corporation, which includes the Hoyle Pond and Borden underground mines and the Pamour open-pit mine. The company also holds 100% of the Cordero project in Chihuahua, Mexico, one of the world's largest undeveloped silver deposits, providing significant silver development upside alongside growing gold production.
